specific_question: What percentage of the Elexion Automotive supply chain for battery components was sourced from North American suppliers?
answer: In 2024, 61% of Elexion Automotive's supply chain for battery components, including lithium, nickel and cobalt materials, was sourced from North American suppliers, which back in 2023 was 54%.
dr_question: What impact would a 20% increase in dealer-led customer education on EV infotainment and connectivity features have on reducing service visit frequency by 2027?
